zh.lifeSummary: 當Adelheid van Leuven於大約1090年出生在法國洛萊時，她的父親Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III35歲，母親Gertrude de Flandre22歲。她於大約1112年與Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1158年在法國布格-福朗-可特艾o-達塔吉利阿巴易享年70歲，埋葬在法國布格o-達塔吉利阿巴易。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Adelheid van Leuven于大约1090年出生在法国洛萊时，她的父亲Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III35岁，母亲Gertrude de Flandre22岁。她于大约1112年与Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1158年在法国布格-福朗-可特艾o-達塔吉利阿巴易享年70岁，埋葬在法国布格o-達塔吉利阿巴易。

nameMeanings.name: van
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Anh, Thanh, Hung, Minh, Vinh, Dung, Hue, Huong, Lan, Quang, Tan, Thuy, Hong, Chi, Hang, Ho, Pok, Sang, Bai, Chin, Ching, Chu, Chuan, Dong.
Vietnamese (Vạn): from the Chinese surname 萬, see Wan 1.
Vietnamese (Văn): from the Chinese surnames 文 or 聞, see Wen 2 and 3, and also 5 below.

variants.name: Wan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Hong, Yi, Qi, Qiang, Wai, Yiu, Yuk, Chien-Min, Fang, Hin, Jichun, Li, Man, Chung, Min, Yiping, Pak, Sik, Sung Man.  Vietnamese Tin, Bang, Da, Hien, Hoi, Lan, Minh Quang, Sau, Tich, Tung, Yaping, Yuet.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 萬, which means ‘ten thousand’ literally or ‘very great number’ figuratively: (i) from the personal name of Bi Wan (畢萬), an official in the state of Jin (located in present-day Shanxi province). He was said to be a descendant of Bi Gong Gao (known as Duke of Bi), the 15th son of the virtuous King Wen of Zhou (reined 1152–1056  BC ). Bi Wan was later granted the fiefdom of Wei (魏), which in 403  BC  became the state of Wei (located in present-day Shanxi, Shaanxi, Henan and Hebei provinces). Some of his descendants adopted Wei (魏) as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his personal name, as their surname. (ii) from the personal name Wan (萬), style name of Rui Bo (芮伯, the Earl of Rui), an official of the Western Zhou dynasty (1046–771  BC ), who was granted the fief Rui (located in Ruicheng in Shaanxi province). Some of his descendants inherited Rui (芮), the name of the fief, as their surname, while others inherited 萬 (Wan), his style name, as their surname. (iii) from the placename Wan (萬), the name of a fief (located in Juxian in Shandong province) granted during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ) to an official in the ancient state of Chu. (iv) from the first element of the name of the Wan Si (萬俟) family, who lived in the downstream areas of the Yellow River during the Northern Qi dynasty (550–577  AD ). (v) from the second element of the name of the Tu Wan (吐萬) family, who are members of the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 完, meaning ‘complete’ in Chinese: (i) said to be borne by the descendants of Huan Zhui, a grandson of the Duke Huan of Song (ruler of the state of Song, died 651  BC ). (ii) from Wan (完), the name of Qu Wan (屈完), an official in the state of Chu during the Spring and Autumn Period (770–476  BC ). (iii) shortened form of the compound surname Wan-Yan (完顔), a surname from minority ethnic groups such as Juchen ethnic group in ancient northern China.

nameMeanings.name: Leuven
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Gerd, Inge, Merwin, Wilhelm.
North German: from the ancient Germanic personal name represented by Old English Lēofwine, composed of the elements lēof ‘dear, beloved’ + wine ‘friend’.

variants.name: Levens
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in Cumbria, so named from the Old English personal name Lēofa (genitive form) + næss ‘promontory’.
North German, Dutch, and Flemish: patronymic from   Leven   2.

variants.name: Levin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Meyer, Moshe, Aron, Emanuel, Yakov, Hyman, Isadore, Doron, Batya.
Jewish (mainly from Lithuania and Belarus): variant of Levy , formed with the Slavic possesive suffix -in in place of the original ending.
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from the German personal name Levin (see 4 below). As a Jewish name it sometimes represents a pet form of western Yiddish ‘lion’ (compare Lowe 3).

nameMeanings.name: Adelheid
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Adelheid van Leuven was born about 1090, in Lorraine, France, her father, Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III, was 35 and her mother, Gertrude de Flandre, was 22. She married Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine about 1112. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. She died about 1158, in Tart-l'Abbaye, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, at the age of 70, and was buried in Tart-l'Abbaye, Côte-d'Or, Burgundy, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Adelheid van Leuven est née environ 1090, à Lorraine, France, son père, Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Gertrude de Flandre, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine environ 1112. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1158, à Tart-l'Abbaye, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterrée à Tart-l'Abbaye, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Adelheid van Leuven um 1090 in Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III 35 und ihre Mutter Gertrude de Flandre 22. Sie hat um 1112 Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Sie starb um 1158 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Tart-l'Abbaye, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich und wurde in Tart-l'Abbaye, Côte-d'Or, Burgund, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid van Leuven è nata il circa 1090 nel Lorraine, Francia, sua padre, Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Gertrude de Flandre, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine circa 1112. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì circa 1158, nel Tart-l'Abbaye, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolta a Tart-l'Abbaye, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Adelheid van Leuvenが約1090年にフランスロレィヌで生まれた時，父Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel IIIは35歳，母Gertrude de Flandreは22歳であった。約1112年にSimon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraineと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1158年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeクoテ-ド'オルタート-ル'アッバイで70歳で死去し，フランスボウルゴグンクoテ-ド'オルタート-ル'アッバイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Adelheid van Leuven(이)가 대략 1090년 프랑스 로레이인에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gertrude de Flandre(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 대략 1112년 Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1158년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e co테-드'어 터아르트-'압베이에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 부르고그니 co테-드'어 터아르트-'압베이에 묻혔다.

mn.Reading Abbey, England: Reading, Bearrucscīr, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Adelheid van Leuven nasceu aproximadamente 1090, em Lorraine, França, seu pai, Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Gertrude de Flandre, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine aproximadamente 1112. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1158, em Tart-l'Abbaye, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, com 70 anos, e foi sepultada em Tart-l'Abbaye, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Adelheid van Leuven родилась около 1090 г. в местности лорреаин, Франция, её отцу по имени Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Gertrude de Flandre, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine около 1112 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Она умерла около 1158 г. в местности тарт-л'аббеи, кoте-д'ор, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция в возрасте 70 лет и была похоронена в местности тарт-л'аббеи, кoте-д'ор, бургогн, Франция.

sm.um 1090–about 1158: e tusa o le 1090–e tusa o le 1158

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Adelheid van Leuven nació aproximadamente 1090, en Lorraine, Francia, su papá, Hendrik van Leuven-Brussel III, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Gertrude de Flandre, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Simon Ier dit le Grois de Lorraine aproximadamente 1112. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1158, en Tart-l'Abbaye, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultada en Tart-l'Abbaye, Côte-d'Or, Bourgogne, Francia.
